creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 190082
patch for remotebox v2.4

An update to the latest version v2.4 of remotebox is recommended because the current version v1.8.1 is officially designed only for VirtualBox v4.3.x, which is no longer available in the ports tree.

Here is a patch to update remotebox to v2.4. This version also officially supports the latest version of VirtualBox v5.2.x.

The update adds a few new files and one file is removed compared to the old version. Otherwise, everything stayed the same.

HTH
